# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/**'

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read
  statuses: write

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
  PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
  PR_BASE_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
  PR_HEAD_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}

jobs:
  extract-pr-metadata:
    name: Extract PR Metadata
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      pr_title: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_title }}
      pr_description: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_description }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_number }}
      pr_author: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_author }}
      pr_labels: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}
      pr_milestone: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_milestone }}
      change_type: ${{ steps.classify.outputs.change_type }}
      sanitized_title: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}
      short_sha: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
      build_timestamp: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_timestamp }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Extract PR metadata
        id: metadata
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;

            const prTitle = pr.title || 'No title';
            const prDescription = pr.body || 'No description provided';
            const prNumber = pr.number;
            const prAuthor = pr.user.login;
            const prLabels = pr.labels.map(l => l.name).join(', ') || 'none';
            const prMilestone = pr.milestone ? pr.milestone.title : 'none';

            // Sanitize title for use in commit messages and filenames
            const sanitizedTitle = prTitle
              .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\s\-_]/g, '')
              .replace(/\s+/g, '-')
              .substring(0, 80)
              .toLowerCase();

            const shortSha = context.sha.substring(0, 7);
            const buildTimestamp = new Date().toISOString();

            // Truncate description for notifications (keep first 500 chars)
            const truncatedDescription = prDescription.length > 500
              ? prDescription.substring(0, 500) + '...'
              : prDescription;

            core.setOutput('pr_title', prTitle);
            core.setOutput('pr_description', truncatedDescription);
            core.setOutput('pr_number', prNumber.toString());
            core.setOutput('pr_author', prAuthor);
            core.setOutput('pr_labels', prLabels);
            core.setOutput('pr_milestone', prMilestone);
            core.setOutput('sanitized_title', sanitizedTitle);
            core.setOutput('short_sha', shortSha);
            core.setOutput('build_timestamp', buildTimestamp);

            console.log(`PR #${prNumber}: ${prTitle}`);
            console.log(`Author: ${prAuthor}`);
            console.log(`Labels: ${prLabels}`);
            console.log(`Milestone: ${prMilestone}`);
            console.log(`Sanitized Title: ${sanitizedTitle}`);

      - name: Classify change type
        id: classify
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;
            const title = (pr.title || '').toLowerCase();
            const labels = pr.labels.map(l => l.name.toLowerCase());

            let changeType = 'other';

            if (title.startsWith('feat') || labels.includes('feature') || labels.includes('enhancement')) {
              changeType = 'feature';
            } else if (title.startsWith('fix') || labels.includes('bug') || labels.includes('bugfix')) {
              changeType = 'bugfix';
            } else if (title.startsWith('docs') || labels.includes('documentation')) {
              changeType = 'docs';
            } else if (title.startsWith('chore') || title.startsWith('ci') || labels.includes('chore')) {
              changeType = 'chore';
            } else if (title.startsWith('refactor') || labels.includes('refactor')) {
              changeType = 'refactor';
            } else if (title.startsWith('perf') || labels.includes('performance')) {
              changeType = 'performance';
            } else if (title.startsWith('test') || labels.includes('test')) {
              changeType = 'test';
            } else if (title.includes('breaking') || labels.includes('breaking-change')) {
              changeType = 'breaking';
            }

            core.setOutput('change_type', changeType);
            console.log(`Change type classified as: ${changeType}`);

  build:
    name: Build & Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: extract-pr-metadata
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ steps.build_result.outputs.status }}
      build_duration: ${{ steps.build_result.outputs.duration }}
      test_results: ${{ steps.build_result.outputs.test_results }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Display build context
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "  BUILD CONTEXT"
          echo "========================================="
          echo "PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          echo "Author: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          echo "Change Type: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}"
          echo "Labels: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}"
          echo "Milestone: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_milestone }}"
          echo "SHA: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.short_sha }}"
          echo "Timestamp: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.build_timestamp }}"
          echo "========================================="
          echo ""
          echo "Description:"
          echo "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}"
          echo "========================================="

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up build for: PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }} - ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"

      - name: Run build
        id: run_build
        run: |
          BUILD_START=$(date +%s)

          echo "Building PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"

          # Replace with actual build commands
          echo "Running build steps..."
          # npm ci && npm run build
          # OR: ./gradlew build
          # OR: make build

          BUILD_END=$(date +%s)
          BUILD_DURATION=$((BUILD_END - BUILD_START))
          echo "build_duration=${BUILD_DURATION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Run tests
        id: run_tests
        run: |
          echo "Running tests for PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"

          # Replace with actual test commands
          # npm test -- --ci --reporters=default
          # OR: ./gradlew test
          # OR: make test

          echo "test_results=All tests passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Determine build result
        id: build_result
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.run_build.outcome }}" == "success" ] && [ "${{ steps.run_tests.outcome }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "status=failure" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
          echo "duration=${{ steps.run_build.outputs.build_duration }}s" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "test_results=${{ steps.run_tests.outputs.test_results }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  generate-release-notes-entry:
    name: Generate Release Notes Entry
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Create release notes entry
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');

            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const prNumber = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}`;
            const prAuthor = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}`;
            const changeType = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}`;
            const prDescription = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}`;
            const prLabels = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}`;
            const prMilestone = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_milestone }}`;
            const buildStatus = `${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}`;
            const shortSha = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.short_sha }}`;

            const changeTypeEmojis = {
              feature: '✨',
              bugfix: '🐛',
              docs: '📚',
              chore: '🔧',
              refactor: '♻️',
              performance: '⚡',
              test: '🧪',
              breaking: '💥',
              other: '📌'
            };

            const emoji = changeTypeEmojis[changeType] || '📌';

            const entry = {
              pr_number: parseInt(prNumber),
              title: prTitle,
              author: prAuthor,
              change_type: changeType,
              description: prDescription,
              labels: prLabels,
              milestone: prMilestone,
              build_status: buildStatus,
              sha: shortSha,
              timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
              release_note_line: `${emoji} ${prTitle} (#${prNumber}) @${prAuthor}`
            };

            console.log('Release Notes Entry:');
            console.log(JSON.stringify(entry, null, 2));
            console.log('');
            console.log('Formatted release note line:');
            console.log(entry.release_note_line);

            // Write the entry to a file for potential artifact upload
            fs.writeFileSync('release-note-entry.json', JSON.stringify(entry, null, 2));

      - name: Upload release notes artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-note-entry-pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: release-note-entry.json
          retention-days: 90

  notify-build-status:
    name: Send Build Notifications
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Determine notification details
        id: notification
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}';
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const prNumber = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}';
            const prAuthor = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}';
            const changeType = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}';
            const prDescription = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}`;
            const buildDuration = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}';
            const testResults = '${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}';
            const prUrl = '${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}';
            const shortSha = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.short_sha }}';
            const prLabels = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}';
            const prMilestone = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_milestone }}';
            const runUrl = `${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}`;

            const statusEmoji = buildStatus === 'success' ? '✅' : '❌';
            const statusText = buildStatus === 'success' ? 'PASSED' : 'FAILED';

            // Slack-compatible message
            const slackMessage = {
              text: `${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}: PR #${prNumber} - ${prTitle}`,
              blocks: [
                {
                  type: 'header',
                  text: {
                    type: 'plain_text',
                    text: `${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}`
                  }
                },
                {
                  type: 'section',
                  fields: [
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*PR:* <${prUrl}|#${prNumber} ${prTitle}>` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Author:* @${prAuthor}` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Change Type:* ${changeType}` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Labels:* ${prLabels}` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Milestone:* ${prMilestone}` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Build Duration:* ${buildDuration}` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Commit:* ${shortSha}` },
                    { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Tests:* ${testResults}` }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  type: 'section',
                  text: {
                    type: 'mrkdwn',
                    text: `*Description:*\n${prDescription.substring(0, 300)}`
                  }
                },
                {
                  type: 'actions',
                  elements: [
                    {
                      type: 'button',
                      text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'View PR' },
                      url: prUrl
                    },
                    {
                      type: 'button',
                      text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'View Build' },
                      url: runUrl
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            };

            // Teams-compatible message
            const teamsMessage = {
              '@type': 'MessageCard',
              themeColor: buildStatus === 'success' ? '00FF00' : 'FF0000',
              summary: `Build ${statusText}: PR #${prNumber} - ${prTitle}`,
              sections: [{
                activityTitle: `${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}: PR #${prNumber}`,
                activitySubtitle: prTitle,
                facts: [
                  { name: 'Author', value: prAuthor },
                  { name: 'Change Type', value: changeType },
                  { name: 'Labels', value: prLabels },
                  { name: 'Milestone', value: prMilestone },
                  { name: 'Build Duration', value: buildDuration },
                  { name: 'Tests', value: testResults },
                  { name: 'Commit', value: shortSha }
                ],
                text: prDescription.substring(0, 300)
              }],
              potentialAction: [
                { '@type': 'OpenUri', name: 'View PR', targets: [{ os: 'default', uri: prUrl }] },
                { '@type': 'OpenUri', name: 'View Build', targets: [{ os: 'default', uri: runUrl }] }
              ]
            };

            core.setOutput('slack_message', JSON.stringify(slackMessage));
            core.setOutput('teams_message', JSON.stringify(teamsMessage));
            core.setOutput('status_emoji', statusEmoji);
            core.setOutput('status_text', statusText);
            core.setOutput('summary', `${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}: PR #${prNumber} - ${prTitle} by @${prAuthor} [${changeType}]`);

            console.log('=== Notification Summary ===');
            console.log(`${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}: PR #${prNumber} - ${prTitle}`);
            console.log(`Author: @${prAuthor}`);
            console.log(`Change Type: ${changeType}`);
            console.log(`Duration: ${buildDuration}`);

      - name: Post notification to Slack
        if: env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          curl -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data '${{ steps.notification.outputs.slack_message }}' \
            "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"

      - name: Post notification to Microsoft Teams
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          curl -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data '${{ steps.notification.outputs.teams_message }}' \
            "$TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL"

      - name: Post PR comment with build status
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}';
            const statusEmoji = '${{ steps.notification.outputs.status_emoji }}';
            const statusText = '${{ steps.notification.outputs.status_text }}';
            const buildDuration = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}';
            const testResults = '${{ needs.build.outputs.test_results }}';
            const changeType = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}';
            const shortSha = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.short_sha }}';
            const runUrl = `${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}`;

            const body = `## ${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}

            | Property | Value |
            |----------|-------|
            | **Status** | ${statusText} |
            | **Change Type** | ${changeType} |
            | **Commit** | \`${shortSha}\` |
            | **Duration** | ${buildDuration} |
            | **Tests** | ${testResults} |
            | **Workflow Run** | [View Details](${runUrl}) |

            ---
            *This comment is auto-generated for release notes tracking.*
            *Build triggered at ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.build_timestamp }}*`;

            // Find and update existing comment or create new one
            const comments = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: context.issue.number
            });

            const botComment = comments.data.find(comment =>
              comment.body.includes('This comment is auto-generated for release notes tracking')
            );

            if (botComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: botComment.id,
                body: body
              });
              console.log('Updated existing build status comment');
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: context.issue.number,
                body: body
              });
              console.log('Created new build status comment');
            }

      - name: Set commit status with PR context
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}';
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const prNumber = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}';
            const changeType = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}';
            const runUrl = `${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}`;

            await github.rest.repos.createCommitStatus({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              sha: context.sha,
              state: buildStatus === 'success' ? 'success' : 'failure',
              target_url: runUrl,
              description: `PR #${prNumber} [${changeType}]: ${prTitle.substring(0, 100)}`,
              context: 'PR Build / Release Notes Tracker'
            });

      - name: Output final notification summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "  NOTIFICATION SUMMARY"
          echo "========================================="
          echo "${{ steps.notification.outputs.summary }}"
          echo ""
          echo "Notifications sent to:"
          echo "  - GitHub PR Comment: ✅"
          echo "  - GitHub Commit Status: ✅"
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "  - Slack: ✅"
          else
            echo "  - Slack: ⏭️ (no webhook configured)"
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "  - Microsoft Teams: ✅"
          else
            echo "  - Microsoft Teams: ⏭️ (no webhook configured)"
          fi
          echo "========================================="
